article_meta.title: Politics Why Minnesotans Still Haven't Backed Down From Fighting ICE It's freezing

reasoning: No attribution violations and several genuine author-voice bias instances were flagged, but the model used labels outside the allowed taxonomy and missed multiple clear biased phrases in the author’s prose.

custom_reasoning.attribution_rule_compliance: All flagged passages are from the author’s narration, not quotes or attributed speech.
custom_reasoning.false_positive_rate: Most flagged items reflect genuine bias (derogatory epithets, emotive metaphors, one-sided framing). The broad ‘entire article’ omission call is defensible given the lack of ICE viewpoints.
custom_reasoning.false_negative_rate: Missed multiple prominent biases in author prose, e.g., “It’s terrifying. … potentially deadly,” “ICE is here, and ICE has killed, and ICE may kill again,” “ICE atrocities,” “menacingly,” and other loaded framings.
custom_reasoning.bias_type_accuracy: Repeatedly used non-listed labels (Loaded Language, Framing Bias, Omission Bias, Sympathetic Framing, Editorializing) instead of the specified types (e.g., Word Choice, Slant, Sensationalism/Emotionalism, Bias by Omission, Mudslinging/Ad Hominem).
